meaning: n.可感知(性),可感觉(性),可察觉(性),可辨(性)
examples: The suggested formula features simplicity in calculation, perceptibility in appearance, and close approximation of calculated resistances to that of the model tests.
Proposed conception of Generic technology was that the perceptibility of connotation and characteristic about technology was deepened with the view of economy and management.
The familiarity, embodiment, perceptibility and basic level categorization of the contents carried by the multimedia-interface are crucial for children to construct sound mental model.
